name: Elevator Mirror Selfie - Late Night
description: Luxury elevator with multiple mirror reflections and iPhone low-light aesthetic
input_prompt: mirror selfie in elevator late at night

meta.style: raw iPhone mirror realism, zero smoothing, heavy reflections, subtle grain, imperfect exposure

subject.description: Young adult woman with a fit-curvy build, dark blonde messy hair, and a soft half-smirk, taking a late-night mirror selfie in a luxury elevator with multiple reflections.

body.physique: Fit-curvy frame with tight defined waist, round hips, thick thighs, and full natural chest.
body.anatomy: Standing close to the mirror with hips shifted strongly to one side, one knee bent inward, torso angled, shoulders relaxed, phone held low in the right hand.
body.details: Real skin texture with slight sheen, no blur, reflections multiplying curves in the mirrors.

subject.face: Neutral expression with a soft half-smirk, eyes focused on the phone screen, minimal makeup with glossy lips catching light.
subject.hair: Dark blonde hair, loose and slightly messy with a few strands stuck to lips and cheek.
subject.skin: Warm fair tone with realistic texture and slight sheen, no smoothing.
subject.expression_mood: young adult, controlled confidence, quietly provocative

wardrobe.top: Tight cropped tank top in soft grey, hugging the chest naturally with fine rib texture, no bra.
wardrobe.bottom: Ultra-short micro biker shorts in thin matte spandex, painted-on tight with slight ride-up and visible fabric tension at the hips, clean and logo-free.

pose_action.description: Mirror selfie stance with the phone held low, framing from upper thighs to head at arm-length.
pose_action.posture: Hips shifted to one side, one knee bent inward, shoulders relaxed, torso angled, free hand resting lightly on upper thigh.

scene.environment: Luxury apartment elevator interior with mirrored walls and brushed stainless steel panels, late night.
scene.background: Mirror walls on three sides creating multiple reflections, LED ceiling strip lights, red digital floor number glow, slight fingerprints and smudges on the mirror.
scene.atmosphere: Private tension in a public box, quiet, charged, intimate.

effects: cool white overhead LED highlights on hips and thighs
warm spill from control panel lights
specular reflections multiplying curves in mirrors
face partially lit, partially disappearing in reflections
real iPhone low-light noise in shadows
lighting.shadows: Low-light shadows with visible phone noise.

camera.technical: iPhone front camera mirror selfie, 24mm, arm-length distance, slightly low and close angle, subtle grain and imperfect exposure, phone edge visible in reflection, minor motion blur from breathing.
camera.negative_constraints: No perfect centering, no studio lighting, no airbrushed skin, no professional photography look, no smiling widely.

reflection_integrity.phone_in_reflection: visible, showing back of phone case
details_in_reflection: back view of subject visible in side mirrors

flux.prompt: masterpiece, ultra-realistic, 8k, raw iPhone mirror selfie, young woman in luxury elevator with mirrored walls, dark blonde hair loose messy strands on lips, tight grey cropped tank top no bra visible rib texture, ultra-short black micro biker shorts painted-on tight, white sneakers, fit-curvy body hips shifted to side, neutral expression soft half-smirk focused on phone, multiple infinite mirror reflections showing back view, brushed steel panels LED strip lights red floor number, late night low-light iPhone noise, 9:16 vertical
flux.negative_prompt: studio lighting, professional photo, airbrushed, smooth skin, perfect centering, bright lighting, wide smile, cartoon, anime

midjourney.prompt: raw iPhone mirror selfie in luxury elevator mirrored walls, young woman dark blonde messy hair, grey cropped tank black biker shorts white sneakers, fit curvy hips shifted, neutral half-smirk, multiple infinite mirror reflections, LED strip lights brushed steel, late night moody low-light aesthetic --ar 9:16 --style raw --v 6
midjourney.notes: Use --style raw for authentic phone camera look

ideogram.prompt: iPhone mirror selfie in luxury elevator with mirrored walls creating infinite reflections, young woman in grey cropped tank and black biker shorts, dark blonde messy hair, neutral confident expression, late night low-light aesthetic, LED strip lights, brushed steel panels

recraft.prompt: Mirror selfie in elevator with multiple reflections, young woman in grey tank and black shorts, dark blonde hair, confident pose hips shifted, late night low-light mood, LED lights

luma.prompt: Elevator mirror selfie scene, woman checking phone in mirrored elevator, infinite reflections in glass, LED lights overhead, late night mood, slight phone movement as she adjusts angle
luma.motion_notes: Subtle movement of adjusting selfie angle, reflections shift slightly

grok-imagine.prompt: Late night elevator mirror selfie, woman in grey tank and black biker shorts, mirrored walls creating infinite reflections, dark blonde messy hair, confident pose, iPhone low-light aesthetic

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A young woman takes a mirror selfie in a luxury apartment elevator late at night. She has dark blonde loose messy hair with a few strands stuck to her lips and cheek. She wears a tight grey cropped tank top with visible fine rib texture hugging her chest naturally with no bra, and ultra-short black micro biker shorts in thin matte spandex that are painted-on tight barely covering upper thighs, with white sneakers. Her fit-curvy body shows a tight defined waist, round hips, and thick thighs. She stands close to the mirror with hips shifted strongly to one side, one knee bent inward, holding the phone low with her free hand resting lightly on her upper thigh. Her expression is neutral with a soft half-smirk, eyes focused on phone screen, minimal makeup with glossy lips catching light. The elevator has mirror walls on three sides creating multiple infinite reflections showing her back view, brushed stainless steel panels, LED ceiling strip lights, and a digital floor number glowing red. The lighting is mixed cool white overhead LEDs with warm panel spill, creating real iPhone low-light noise in shadows. No watermark. No artificial smoothing. Realistic skin texture with slight sheen.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Young woman taking iPhone mirror selfie in luxury elevator with mirrored walls, dark blonde messy hair strands on lips, tight grey cropped tank top no bra visible rib texture, ultra-short black micro biker shorts painted-on tight, white sneakers, fit-curvy body hips shifted to side knee bent, neutral half-smirk focused on phone, multiple infinite mirror reflections showing back view, brushed steel panels LED strip lights red floor number, late night low-light aesthetic subtle grain, 9:16 vertical, not airbrushed, not studio lighting
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: A raw iPhone mirror selfie of a young woman in a luxury elevator with mirrored walls on three sides creating infinite reflections. She has dark blonde loose messy hair with strands stuck to her lips. She wears a tight grey cropped tank top with rib texture and ultra-short black micro biker shorts, white sneakers. Fit-curvy body with hips shifted to one side, neutral expression with soft half-smirk. Brushed stainless steel panels, LED ceiling strip lights, red digital floor number. Late night low-light iPhone aesthetic with natural grain and noise in shadows. Multiple reflections show her back view.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the tank top color from grey to white while keeping the woman's pose, expression, and body position the same. Preserve the elevator mirror reflections, LED lighting, and late night aesthetic.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Deep nesting for outfit details, reflection layers
2_realism_anchors: 'iPhone low-light noise', 'fingerprints on mirror', 'strands stuck to lips'
4_negative_hygiene: explicit list preventing pro photography look
6_lighting_storytelling: mixed LED lighting creates late-night tension
7_reflection_integrity: Nano Banana specialty - detailed mirror logic
